mapper.update: UPDATE project SET identifier = #{identifier}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, is_public = #{isPublic}, parent_id = #{parentId}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT identifier, title, description, is_public, parent_id, start_date, end_date, default_version_id FROM project WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id AS roleId, name AS roleName FROM roles WHERE id >= 'ROLE0004'

SELECT id, name FROM users u WHERE status = 'H1' AND role = 'ROLE0003' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM project_member pm WHERE pm.user_id = u.id AND pm.project_id = #{projectId} AND pm.is_delete = 'F0' )
AND name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT id, name FROM groups g WHERE NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM project_member pm WHERE pm.group_id = g.id AND pm.project_id = #{projectId} AND pm.is_delete = 'F0' )
AND name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
